subcodes.first_line: O dwellers of the inhabited realm! Hearken unto the call of your Lord, the All-Forgiving, from the direction of this Manifestation whereby illumination hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اصحاب المعمور ان استمعوا ندآء ربکم الغفور من شطر هذا الظهور الذی به اضاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
